Scope.description: Access scope of a device token (SPEC §2.A scope table).

oneOf.description: Text to display, speech state — read only (partner-facing screen).
Full composer, suggestions, TTS, input (the user's devices).
Everything (embedded UI and local CLI only).

description:
`POST /pair/window` request — opens the pairing window from the main
UI (SPEC §2.A: pairing is only possible during an explicitly opened
window; the route itself is system-scope, ADR-0005 §7).

scope.description: Scope the resulting token will carry.

title: PairWindowRequest
